name: renpy-analytics
description: Structure folding, story-flow analysis, save-file safety checks, and writing metrics for Ren'Py projects. Companion to vscode-language-renpy and renpy-magic.

commands.title: Ren'Py: Fold All Labels and Menus
Ren'Py: Generate Footers for All Files
Ren'Py: Show Story Flow Graph (Current File)

walkthroughs.title: Get started with Ren'Py Analytics
walkthroughs.description: Map your story, catch save-file bugs, track flags, and playtest from the cursor.

steps.title: Analyze your project
steps.description:
Scan every .rpy file: story flow, inaccessible labels, dead ends, save-file risks, and writing metrics.
[Analyze Project](command:renpy-analytics.analyzeProject)

steps.title: See your story as a map
steps.description:
An interactive graph of every label and menu choice — entry points green, unreachable scenes red, conditions on the edges.
[Show Story Flow Graph](command:renpy-analytics.showFlowGraph)

steps.title: Track flags without a spreadsheet
steps.description:
The Variables pane shows where every flag is declared, set (and by which choice), and gated — plus flags that can never trigger.
[Open Ren'Py Analytics views](command:workbench.view.extension.renpy-analytics)

steps.title: Fold to the story skeleton
steps.description:
Collapse a script to its labels and menus to see the chapter at a glance.
[Fold All Labels and Menus](command:renpy-analytics.foldAllLabelsAndMenus)

steps.title: Playtest from the cursor
steps.description:
Launch the game warped straight to the line you're editing — no replaying from the start.
[Playtest From Here](command:renpy-analytics.playtestFromHere)

renpy-analytics.saveSafety.enabled.description: Report save-file safety risks (define'd variables changed at runtime, mutable define literals, variables created inside labels without a default) in the Problems panel.

renpy-analytics.gameDir.description: Restrict analysis to this folder (workspace-relative or absolute). Leave empty to analyze every .rpy file in the workspace. Useful in monorepos containing several copies of a game — set it via the 'Ren'Py: Select Game Folder' command.

renpy-analytics.extraEntryPoints.description: Additional label names treated as reachability roots (e.g. labels entered via config.label_overrides or custom launchers).

renpy-analytics.footer.sections.description: Which sections the generated file footer includes. Teams that don't want variable lists in shipped scripts can drop 'variables'.

renpy-analytics.footer.onSave.description: Regenerate the footer on save for files that already contain one (files without a footer are never touched).

renpy-analytics.codeLens.enabled.description: Show a consequence summary above each menu choice (stat changes, function calls, jump targets).

renpy-analytics.readingSpeedWpm.description: Words-per-minute used for reading-time estimates in the Current File view.

renpy-analytics.sdkPath.description: Path to the Ren'Py SDK folder (or its renpy.exe / renpy.sh) used by 'Ren'Py: Playtest From Here'. Leave empty to auto-detect common install locations; the picker saves your choice here.

enumDescriptions: Report inaccessible labels as warnings even when dynamic jumps exist (messages note possible false positives).
Downgrade inaccessible-label findings to Information when the project contains dynamic jumps.
renpy-analytics.dynamicJumpMode.description: How to report inaccessible labels when the project contains dynamic jumps ('jump expression …') whose targets can't be resolved statically.
